accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.delete_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to delete this credential? This action cannot be undone.

pin_security.no_pins_desc: Add your first PIN to start.

documents_mode.title: Notes
documents_mode.my_notes_desc: Access and edit your saved encrypted notes.

documents.save_existing_desc: Import and securely encrypt an existing file from your computer.
documents.delete_confirm_message: Are you sure? This action cannot be undone.
documents.empty_desc: Create your first encrypted note using the editor.

board.placeholder: Type or paste your secret notes here...
board.paste_warning: Attention! the pasted text contains system commands. Never copy and paste this into a terminal unless you know exactly what it does.
board.sidebar_board_desc: Use this editor to write your notes securely. All content is encrypted locally.

import_view.subtitle: Select the type of import.
import_view.external_desc: Import passwords from a CSV file (e.g. Google Chrome).
import_view.error_no_passwords: No valid passwords found in the file.
import_view.success_skipped: {count} accounts were imported (estimated source: {format}). {skipped} rows were ignored due to missing password.

export_pack.title: Export package
export_pack.warning: Data will be encrypted for security, make sure you remember the password.

security.title: Extend Security
security.totp_disable_confirm: You can reactivate 2FA at any time.
security.totp_disable_subtitle: WARNING: After this action, you will need to remove the vault account from your mobile app and reconfigure 2FA if you decide to use it again, for the synchronization to be valid.
security.totp_export_warning: This action is required to disable two-factor authentication; be sure to import this package next time you need it.
security.totp_warning: 2FA using apps like Microsoft Authenticator can sync your seed to external servers (Microsoft cloud). This is your personal decision. Bóveda only stores the seed locally and encrypted. You are solely responsible for this choice. The seed itself is an open standard (RFC 6238) and never leaves your device. Only the app you choose can introduce cloud dependencies.
security.totp_scan_desc: Scan this QR code with your preferred authentication app.
security.totp_error_invalid: The code is incorrect. Try again.
security.totp_success_desc: From now on, bóveda will ask for a security code every time you unlock your vault.
security.totp_unlock_desc: Enter the 6-digit code from your authentication app.
security.totp_recovery_desc: Enter one of your recovery codes to disable 2FA and regain access.
security.totp_recovery_error: Invalid or already used recovery code.
security.totp_recovery_success: 2FA deactivated successfully! You can now access with just your master password.
security.totp_recovery_warning_setup: ⚠️ KEEP THESE CODES IN A SAFE PLACE. They are the only way to access if you lose your mobile device.

automatic_session_close.title: Automatic Session Close
automatic_session_close.desc: The timer will start only if there is inactivity.
automatic_session_close.tooltip: Bóveda will lock after {seconds} seconds of inactivity.
automatic_session_close.tooltip_never: Bóveda remains unlocked until manually closed.

remote_connection.title: Protect against remote connections
remote_connection.desc: Block Bóveda if it detects remote connections.

theme.accent_description: The accent color personalizes buttons, active icons, and highlighted elements. Bóveda will automatically generate light tones and glow effects based on your choice.
theme.bg_solid_desc: A uniform background color of your choice
theme.bg_image_click: Images with dark tones are recommended
theme.text_primary_desc: Color of titles and main content
theme.text_secondary_desc: Color of labels and supporting texts

performance.title: Additional performance tuning
performance.massive_list_desc: Optimize performance when managing large volumes of credentials.

about.title: About
about.desc: Information about the application and licenses.

account_system.title: Account
account_system.delete_account_desc: Use this option to permanently reset your Bóveda
account_system.delete_confirm: This action will delete your saved data, are you sure you want to delete your account?

updater.title: Updates
updater.desc: Make sure to keep Bóveda updated.
updater.update_error: Error updating. Please try again later.

unlock_screen.new_vault_desc: Create your master password to protect your vault.
unlock_screen.unlock_vault_desc: Enter your master password to unlock.
unlock_screen.error_remote_session: Remote session detected. Bóveda cannot be unlocked.
unlock_screen.warning_new: ⚠️ This password cannot be recovered. Keep it in a safe place.

about_view.title: Why trust bóveda?
about_view.subtitle: Transparency, open source and security through isolation.
about_view.opensource_desc: Bóveda is an open-source project. This means anyone can review the code to ensure there are no backdoors or hidden telemetry.
about_view.local_desc: Your data never leaves your device and the security engine resides in a separate process. This isolation architecture ensures your secrets are shielded from external attacks and common web interface vulnerabilities.
about_view.encryption_desc: Your entire vault is protected using advanced encryption standards.
about_view.update_info: To update this program, you must download the latest version from {link}

groups.pick_a_group: Choose a group for this credential
